candidates.why: Direct total revenue line; matches top-line and appears as the broad revenue label.
Also a valid top-line sales label and numerically identical to Total Revenue; useful as fallback if label changes by year.

variables.notes: Using a priority list because revenue label may vary by year. Total Revenue preferred over Net sales as the broader top-line label.

candidates.why: Best match for direct production/service costs; sits directly below revenue and functions as cost of sales.
Could be an inventory-flow component of cost of sales, but appears blank and is more granular than the broader cost line.
Inventory adjustment component, not the full COGS line on its own.
Balance sheet inventory asset, not an income statement expense.

variables.notes: Selected the broad direct-cost line rather than inventory-flow subcomponents.

candidates.why: Could be overhead-related, but appears unpopulated in preview and is less clearly the main SG&A bucket.
Classic SG&A/overhead component and clearly populated.
Overhead-related compensation component; can be part of SG&A when separately disclosed.
Broad overhead bucket, populated, and likely carries SG&A-type costs especially where explicit SG&A is missing.
Explicit SG&A row; preferred conceptually, but appears missing for 2025 while populated in prior years.
R&D line exists, but it is supplemental and located below EBIT, so should not be added to XSGA under the placement rule.
Balance sheet liability, not an income statement SG&A expense.

variables.notes: Per hierarchy, explicit SG&A exists but is not populated in all years, so included it plus the closest broader overhead bucket. Excluded Personnel expenses and Share-based Payments to avoid likely double counting against the broader overhead bucket. Excluded R&D supplemental because it appears below EBIT.

candidates.why: Only dedicated R&D line available. It is labeled supplemental and appears below EBIT, so valid for XRD but should not be included in XSGA.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D line exists only as a supplemental disclosure below EBIT; mapped to XRD only, not added to XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Best direct interest expense line and preferred primary choice.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - positive
candidates.why: Positive sign suggests offset/reclass item rather than core interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific lease-interest component; useful fallback if broader interest line unavailable.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest - non lease
candidates.why: Alternative detailed interest line excluding lease interest; useful fallback.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest disclosure; low-priority fallback.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest - non lease
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Priority list uses the broadest direct interest expense line first, then alternative detailed/fallback labels. Excluded the positive lease-interest row because it appears to be an offsetting sign variant rather than the main expense line.

candidates.why: Equity component only, not total book equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to parent company shareholders in total
candidates.why: Best book equity measure because it excludes non-controlling interests.
Includes non-controlling interest, so not preferred when owner/parent equity is available.
Balancing row, not a reported equity measure.
Balancing row, not a reported equity measure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total balance sheet, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to parent company shareholders in total

variables.notes: Selected parent-company equity to exclude non-controlling interests, consistent with BE + MIB construction.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement allocation item, not balance sheet minority equity.
Best balance sheet minority-interest line.
Alternative balance sheet label for the same concept; valid fallback.

variables.notes: Used balance sheet NCI labels only; income statement non-controlling interest rows are profit-allocation lines, not minority equity.
